reason: Insect evolution blurs human and bug, a creeping blend that crawls beneath the skin.
A stolen limb’s unsettling rebirth in another body delivers a chilling disquiet.
Alien parasites invade human hosts, shattering flesh boundaries in a relentless horror.
Zombie cells explode grotesquely, a visceral feast of flesh and fear.
A chilling werewolf transformation strips humanity away under the howl of moonlight.
Alien organism overtakes human vessel, a primal dread of losing physical self.
Behavior-modifying drugs warp young minds into violent shells of themselves.
A starship’s madness-inducing gravity generator frays crew sanity in claustrophobic terror.
Liquid-metal blood reshapes flesh in a shapeshifting nightmare you can’t unsee.
Replicant skin decays, raising ghastly questions of mortality and the self.
